name: 多元守卫者 Diverse Defenders
short_description: Diverse Defenders is a strategy game that combines Roguelike and Go elements. Here, you will be able to recruit characters with unique skills and form a powerful hero army. Go deep into various levels and defeat powerful bosses to achieve ultimate victory!
detailed_description:
Diverse Defenders is a strategy game that combines Roguelike and Go elements. Players need to recruit a variety of heroes and equip them with unique equipment to resist enemy attacks, defeat the final boss, and win!

Unique bonds

Like other self-propelled chess games, MultiGuardian also has a complete camp binding system. During the gameplay, you need to choose powerful heroes according to the situation and establish hero teams. There are a lot of hero characters in the game, from sorcerers, marksmen, sword dancers, etc. Each character has its own unique attributes and skills, and I believe you can definitely find your favorite characters in it.

Diverse equipment

In this game, the equipment system is an extremely rich and diverse core feature. Players collect various equipment in the game, including swords, knives, canes, and more, which have different qualities and random attributes. At the same time, equipment can also be enchanted to add set effects. By equipping heroes with appropriate equipment, their combat effectiveness can be greatly improved.

Rich treasures

Treasures can complement the player's growth path. They can improve players' combat effectiveness, economic benefits, and so on. Players need to choose treasures based on the direction of hero formation development, quickly increase the strength of the formation, and lay the groundwork for boss duels.

Powerful Boss

In the game, players will encounter powerful bosses after passing certain levels, each with different skills. Creating unique combat strategies for different bosses is the key to winning.
